api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.3 to align with JDK 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0.x has limited or no support for JDK 21; upgrading to 3.2.x is required for full JDK 21 compatibility and access to recent security/bug fixes.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 as the baseline.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency to restore removed Java EE APIs in JDK 9+.
api/pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB was removed from the JDK in version 11; explicit dependency is required to compile code using javax.xml.bind classes.

api/src/main/java/ch/chalender/api/ApiAp.general_idea: Exclude Thymeleaf auto-configuration to prevent startup failure due to missing dependencies.
api/src/main/java/ch/chalender/api/ApiAp.why_exists: Application fails to start with 'BeanCreationException' or 'ClassNotFoundException' if Thymeleaf starter is not on the classpath but Spring Boot attempts to auto-configure it.
